innateAbility.name: Mana Shield
innateAbility.description: Creates a shield that absorbs incoming damage in exchange for Medusa's mana.

abilities.name: Split Shot
abilities.description: Magically splits her shot into several arrows. These arrows deal a lower percent of her normal damage.

abilities.name: Mystic Snake
abilities.description: Fires an energy bolt that jumps from target to target dealing damage.After it reaches its last target, it returns and replenishes Medusa's mana.

abilities.name: Cold Blooded
abilities.description: When Medusa is offensively unit-targeted by a spell, a single-target Mystic Snake is sent back towards the enemy source.

abilities.name: Gorgon's Grasp
abilities.description: Fires a volley of damaging arrows in a straight line, with each grouping covering a larger radius than the previous.

abilities.name: Stone Gaze
abilities.description: Any enemy units looking at Medusa will have both their movement speed, attack speed, and turn rate slowed.

talents.right: x1.4 Mystic Snake First Damage/Mana Restore
